title: First Dinosaurs
description: The earliest known dinosaurs appear during the Late Triassic.

title: First Mammals
description: Small early mammals emerge during the Late Triassic.

title: Pangaea Breaks Apart
description: The supercontinent begins splitting apart, reshaping oceans, climates, and habitats.

title: Archaeopteryx Appears
description: Archaeopteryx preserves one of the clearest early links between birds and non-avian dinosaurs.

title: Flowering Plants Spread
description: Angiosperms rise during the Cretaceous and transform land ecosystems.

title: K-Pg Extinction
description: An asteroid impact and its aftermath wipe out all non-avian dinosaurs.
